data.title: ChatGPT Prompts for B2B SaaS
data.metaTitle: 15 ChatGPT Prompts for B2B SaaS Marketing & Sales (2026)
data.metaDescription: ChatGPT prompts for B2B SaaS teams to write cold emails, onboarding sequences, feature announcements, and landing pages. Convert more trials and retain more customers.
data.keywords: chatgpt prompts for b2b saas, saas marketing prompts ai, saas cold email prompts chatgpt, b2b saas content prompts
data.heading: 15 ChatGPT Prompts for B2B SaaS That Drive MRR
data.intro: B2B SaaS growth comes from the same 4 levers: acquire, activate, retain, expand. These prompts cover every lever — from cold outreach and landing pages to onboarding flows and expansion emails.

prompts.title: Cold email (ICP outreach)
prompts.prompt: Write a cold email to [PROSPECT NAME], a [TITLE] at [COMPANY TYPE], for [SAAS PRODUCT NAME]. Lead with a specific pain point relevant to their role ([PAIN POINT]). Describe the outcome we deliver in 1 sentence. Offer a low-friction CTA (15-min demo or specific resource). Under 125 words. No product features — outcome-first.
prompts.tip: B2B cold emails that lead with a specific, role-relevant pain point get 3x more replies than those leading with product features.

prompts.title: Trial activation email sequence (3 emails)
prompts.prompt: Write a 3-email trial activation sequence for [SAAS PRODUCT NAME]. Email 1 (Day 0): Welcome + one key action to take today (the 'aha moment' trigger). Email 2 (Day 3): Contextual tip based on what most trial users haven't done yet ([FEATURE]). Email 3 (Day 7): Value reinforcement + upgrade CTA with the main benefit. Each under 200 words.
prompts.tip: Trial emails that guide users to the 'aha moment' increase trial-to-paid conversion by 30-50%.

prompts.title: Product landing page copy (core value prop)
prompts.prompt: Write landing page copy for [SAAS PRODUCT NAME] targeting [ICP]. Include: hero headline (outcome-focused, under 10 words), sub-headline (who it's for + key benefit, under 20 words), problem section (the pain without your product, 2-3 sentences), solution section (how you solve it), 3 feature → benefit pairs, social proof placeholder (testimonials, logos), and primary CTA button text. Under 500 words.
prompts.tip: SaaS landing pages that lead with outcomes ('Close deals 40% faster') convert 2x better than those leading with features ('Automated pipeline management').

prompts.title: Feature announcement email (to existing users)
prompts.prompt: Write a feature announcement email to existing users of [SAAS PRODUCT] announcing [NEW FEATURE NAME]. Structure: subject line (benefit-led), 1-sentence hook, what the feature does, why we built it (user feedback reference), how to access it, and a link to the full announcement or documentation. Under 200 words. Celebratory but brief.
prompts.tip: Feature announcements that reference user feedback ('You asked for this') generate the highest engagement of any product email type.

prompts.title: Churn survey email
prompts.prompt: Write an email to [SAAS PRODUCT] customers who cancelled or are about to cancel. Ask for feedback on why they're leaving. Keep the survey to 2 questions maximum: (1) What's the main reason you're cancelling? (multiple choice with 5 options + other) and (2) What would it take to bring you back? Under 100 words. No sales language.
prompts.tip: Single-question churn surveys have 3x the response rate of 5+ question surveys. Prioritize the most valuable insight.

prompts.title: Demo follow-up email
prompts.prompt: Write a follow-up email to [PROSPECT NAME] at [COMPANY] after a product demo of [SAAS PRODUCT]. Summarize what we covered, address 1-2 questions or concerns raised during the call ([CONCERNS]), include relevant case study or social proof, and propose clear next steps ([TRIAL/PROPOSAL/ANOTHER CALL]). Under 200 words.
prompts.tip: Demo follow-up emails that reference specific concerns raised during the call convert at 2x the rate of generic follow-ups.

prompts.title: Pricing page copy
prompts.prompt: Write pricing page copy for [SAAS PRODUCT NAME] with [2/3] tiers: [TIER NAMES]. For each tier: name, price, 1-sentence positioning, 5 key features/inclusions, and ideal customer description. Include a comparison table header row. Add a FAQ section with 3 questions: (1) Can I change plans? (2) Is there a free trial? (3) What happens when I hit the limit? Under 500 words.
prompts.tip: Pricing pages with 'ideal for' descriptions for each tier reduce sales team questions and increase self-serve conversion.

prompts.title: G2/Capterra review request email
prompts.prompt: Write an in-app or email request for [SAAS PRODUCT NAME] customers to leave a G2 or Capterra review. Explain the value of reviews for the community (not just you). Make the ask specific and low-friction (direct link, 2-3 minutes). Send at a moment of success ([AFTER MILESTONE/POSITIVE INTERACTION]). Under 100 words.
prompts.tip: Review request timing matters more than copy. The moment right after a user achieves their goal is peak satisfaction.

prompts.title: Investor update email (for SaaS startup)
prompts.prompt: Write a monthly investor update for [SAAS STARTUP NAME]. Include: key metrics (MRR [$X], MoM growth [%], churn [%], new customers [N]), highlights (3 bullets), challenges (honest, 1-2), capital runway ([MONTHS]), and asks (specific 2-3 requests for intro/advice). Under 400 words. Transparent, no spin.
prompts.tip: Investor updates that include honest challenges and specific asks generate more value per email than pure highlight reports.

prompts.title: Partnership outreach (technology partner)
prompts.prompt: Write an email to [PARTNER COMPANY NAME] proposing a technology integration partnership. Our product: [YOUR PRODUCT]. Their product: [THEIR PRODUCT]. Overlap: [SHARED ICP]. The integration idea: [DESCRIPTION]. Mutual benefits: [LIST]. CTA: 30-minute call to explore. Under 200 words. Value-first, specific.
prompts.tip: Partnership pitches that quantify the mutual benefit ('combined, we reach 10,000 [ICP] companies') get 3x more responses.

prompts.title: Case study outline (SaaS customer win)
prompts.prompt: Write a case study outline for [CUSTOMER COMPANY NAME] using [SAAS PRODUCT]. Include sections: (1) Customer background (2 sentences), (2) The challenge before [PRODUCT], (3) Why they chose us over alternatives, (4) How they implemented it, (5) Results (specific metrics: [METRICS]), (6) What they'd tell other [ICP TYPE] companies. 200-250 words. Quote placeholder included.
prompts.tip: SaaS case studies that include the competitor they evaluated (and why they chose you) convert high-intent readers 2x better.

prompts.title: Webinar promotion email
prompts.prompt: Write a promotion email for a SaaS webinar titled '[WEBINAR TITLE]' on [DATE]. Target: [AUDIENCE — prospects / customers / both]. Include: subject line, 1-line hook, 3 specific learnings from the webinar, speaker credentials (1 sentence each for up to 2 speakers), logistics, and registration CTA with link. Under 200 words.
prompts.tip: Webinar emails that promise 3 specific learnings (not 'insights and best practices') convert at 2x the rate of vague event invitations.

prompts.title: Expansion email (to existing customer)
prompts.prompt: Write an expansion email to customer [COMPANY NAME] proposing an upgrade from [CURRENT PLAN] to [HIGHER PLAN]. Lead with their current usage data ([USAGE METRIC — near the limit, specific feature they'd benefit from]). Frame the upgrade as enabling their growth. Include the price difference and key additional benefits. CTA: 15-min call. Under 200 words.
prompts.tip: Expansion emails that reference specific usage data ('you've used 90% of your API calls this month') convert at 5x the rate of generic upgrade pitches.

prompts.title: Email signature for SDR/AE (with social proof)
prompts.prompt: Write a professional email signature for [SDR/AE NAME] at [SAAS COMPANY]. Include: name, title, company, phone, LinkedIn URL, and 1 line of social proof (customer count, notable customer logo, award, or a link to a case study). Compact — under 5 lines. Multiple format options: minimal, social-proof-heavy, resource-link.
prompts.tip: Email signatures with one social proof element (customer logo or review rating) increase reply rates by 8-12% in B2B outreach.

prompts.title: Help article (product documentation)
prompts.prompt: Write a help article for [SAAS PRODUCT NAME] explaining how to [DO FEATURE/TASK]. Include: a 1-sentence overview, prerequisites (if any), step-by-step instructions (numbered), a tip for the most common mistake, and a 'what's next' section linking to related articles. Target audience: new users. Under 400 words. Clear, scannable.
prompts.tip: Help articles with numbered steps and a 'common mistake' section reduce support ticket volume by 20-30% for that feature.

data.cta: Automate your SaaS marketing copy with our AI Copy Generator
